generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier errors or type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helper variables in AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE type declarations (int, real, bool) match the expected expression types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` helpers for complex expressions to improve readability and maintainability.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on correcting expressions or declarations.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract placement in component types vs. implementations
